units.content: Fahlman 2006 technical report identified as prior art for marker-passing
Claim 9 distinguished from Scone by schema-enforced admissibility filtering of operational-mechanism vocabulary
Scone does not enforce schema-enforced admissibility filtering
Claim 10 collision classifier distinguished by opening-collision / crack-collision / bridge-collision taxonomy
No prior marker-passing system produces the three-way collision taxonomy
Specification sections §4.8 and §4.9 referenced as support
